initiatives.title: AI Development System Evolution
initiatives.summary: Plan and govern controlled improvements to the AI Development System.

epics.title: Documentation Rails
epics.summary: Create practical documentation and registry control for Project Control Gateway usage.

epics.title: Skills Layer
epics.summary: Document and govern the skills and plugin guidance layer for AI Development System work.

epics.title: Prompt Context Retrieval Layer
epics.summary: Add a controlled, auditable context retrieval layer that builds deterministic Context Packs from registered documentation and project-control state, integrates them into Codex prompt packages, and later supports optional vector search backends.
